title: Olfersia spatulata
intro: Olfersia spatulata, also known as Olfersia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce symptoms of fever, cold, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Olfersia spatulata include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Olfersia is commonly prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including coughs, sore throats, and skin infections.
taxonomy: Olfersia spatulata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It belongs to the genus Olfersia and is native to Southeast Asia.
